communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

The following request is about Orchid—sometimes called Orchid Health https://www.orchidhealth.com/, Orchid Biosciences, Inc https://www.orchidhealth.com/terms-of-service, or Orchid Bioscience, Inc https://opencorporates.com/companies/us_ca/4530928. it's a company focused on fertility -- specifically, the traits and health of embryos. Its CEO is Noor Siddiqui.

According to business filings, one of its registered addresses is 4022 STIRRUP CREEK DR, Suite 312, DURHAM 27703 NC United States, which appears to be a laboratory setting.

Pursuant to the North Carolina Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records (dated from January 1, 2019 to the time this request is processed):

- All tips and 911 audios/transcripts made from the address 4022 STIRRUP CREEK DR, DURHAM 27703 NC, or mentioning said address. Please include any subsequent CAD reports, incident reports, and investigative documents produced in connection to these calls.
- All body camera footage produced in any police responses to the address 4022 STIRRUP CREEK DR, DURHAM 27703 NC.
- All tips or complaints related to Orchid/Orchid Health/Orchid Biosciences/Orchid Bioscience.
- All investigative documents produced in relation to any inquiry involving Orchid/Orchid Health/Orchid Biosciences/Orchid Bioscience.

I respectfully request that my request is expedited, given the newsworthiness and high-profile nature of surrogacy abuse in the US. This WSJ article highlights the issue: https://www.wsj.com/us-news/chinese-billionaires-surrogacy-pregnancy-7fdfc0c3. It mentions that Peter Thiel's family office "has backed a chain of IVF clinics across Southeast Asia and a recently opened branch in Los Angeles." This is referring to GenPrime, but Orchid also receives funding from Peter Thiel. I also respectfully request that documents are released on a rolling basis.

I am a news reporter for WIRED (wired.com), so the requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes. Therefore, I request that any fees are waived. But in the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by email attachment if available.

If you need to contact me, you can reach me at caroline_haskins@wired.com, or here. Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,
Caroline Haskins

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Minnesota Government Data Practices Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. Vendor Names: A list of the names of all organizations that submitted a proposal in response to MPS RFP 26-09 SPED AI Tool. (See here: https://resources.finalsite.net/images/v1769466278/mplsk12mnus/hje4mruybmlutvkfh1vr/RFP26-09SPEDAITool.pdf) Specifically, we request copies of all "Intention to Submit A Proposal" documents (See Appendix 1(a), RFP pg. 21) and "Organization Information Cover Page" documents (See Appendix 2, RFP pg  29) in response to MPS RFP 26-09 SPED AI Tool. 

2. Email Correspondence: All non-exempt email communications from any MPS district employee that include the term "SPED AI Tool" in the subject line, message body, reply message, email attachments, or calendar invitations.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Clarence Okoh

title: Face recognition agreements, training, and use materials

communications.subject: Massachusetts Public Records Law Request: Face recognition agreements, training, and use materials
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

This is a public records request being submitted under Massachusetts Public Records Law.

I hereby request the following records related to this agency’s use of any face recognition platform, including but not limited to any system over which this agency does not maintain primary ownership but to which members of the agency have access or any platform that enables face recognition:

1. AGREEMENTS and CONTRACTS
Any and all agreements (including related amendments, attachments, and exhibits) related to the acquisition and use of this "software," algorithm, or program.

2. INSTRUCTIONAL MATERIALS and TRAINING
All instructional materials, presentations and presentation materials and other guidance on the use of "the software." Responsive materials include recorded video and audio, PowerPoint files, prepared remarks, and slides. This also includes training material governing the use, sharing, or access to the "software" or any data related to or collected by the face recognition software/technology, including the legal standard that is required before using the technology.

3. PRIVACY ASSESSMENTS
A copy of any data retention guidelines or policies or other materials evaluating or guiding the security of the "software" or the privacy of the data involved.

4. USE POLICIES 
Please provide a copy of any policy directives, guidance documents, memoranda, training materials, or similar records governing the use and function of this technology for any law enforcement purpose. Responsive materials include all those related to data retention, permissible and impermissible use, and security standards.

5. USE LOGS
All logs documenting the use of and searched conducted using the face recognition system for the period from August 1, 2025 through February 23, 2026. 

This is a request being made in the public interest and not for commercial motives.

If your office anticipates that it will need to charge fees for the processing of this request, please inform me of the estimated costs to fulfill this request in advance of fully processing this request.

Please provide these materials to me electronically, if possible.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response in accordance with the dictates of the public records law.

Sincerely,

Beryl Lipton
